reviews.review_text: Worst experience. Very high transaction fees. Uninstalling right now.
worst app ever im so sick of this app no customer support at all
if you are using this to trade us stocks please don't. very bad ticket resolution times. i transferred money from etrade to ind money but gets stuck for 3-4 weeks without any proper resolution.
some bugs are showing in the app. in the Bank account every transaction shows double double and also counting the double entry.
why auto pay is not working
Interface is complex and not good. you cannot increase font size. Even if you increase phone font or zoom setting, it will not reflect here. Even after complaining, it is not implemented.

Don't invest in US stocks via INDMoney. Very bad customer support. I initiated transaction for 25K, but it never reached by trading account. I am still waiting for it to be credited from more than 3 weeks. Customer support behaves irresponsibly, repeating same line again and again saying we are following up. update: INDMONEY is still a junk app putting customer in loop of various tickets without completing required work, it's been more than a month still no solution.

They play a trick, just to make sure that you won't get referral amout they won't allow you to add money to wallet till 24 hours so that, given time for referal amount gets completed. faltu app, do not use

customer support is poor; multiple attempts at depositing funds from a funded account, in which the first deposit was successhul remains mysterious and unsolved, customer support is invisible. Any help will be appreciated
great apps in my digital account 😃
too many notifications which can't be switched off
don't open any account on this app. I opened an account on this app for daily savings, then they introduced min balance charges etc. At first they mentioned it's a zero charge account bla bla bla.

I loved the user interface up until today. but for some reason, they changed the background colour of the chart, and moved the overview and other quick categories to a scroll option. and the buy and sell became much smaller and this is annoying during intraday. absolutely horrendous ui decision making
i cannot delete my ind money demat account.

Dear INDmoney, you’ve made instant withdrawal feel like magic! 💸 No waiting, no tension—just one tap and money lands in my bank. Your smooth trading experience + superfast Insta-Withdrawal = pure love. Best decision ever to trade with you. Thank you for treating my money with such speed and care. You’ve earned a lifelong fan!

Old interface was good. Now with white background for charts and information in multiple tabs is very confusing. Earlier it used to show total quantity (holdings plus positions) at the top on the chart. Now there is no such information.
Great app but there should be option to customise homepage to see only what is needed

Some much needed functions are missing 1. Stop Loss and Target sell price can't be placed in one single order. 2. Market Order Depth i.e. top 5 bid-ask quotes function is missing for US stocks. Please add these in the next update
with every update the ui glitches are so high, not at all user friendly, there is no intuitive option to revert back. wanted to rate zero star unfortunately it doesn't allow.
I am unable to add money from my axis bank account I have tried for more than a week and also raised the ticket and it is still not solved

I really enjoy using the app, but the UPI payment experience needs refinement. Currently, it feels like an afterthought rather than a core feature. To improve this, I suggest integrating a more seamless interface and adding fingerprint authentication for faster, more secure UPI transactions.
Best App for trading as well as utility all in one place user interface also very nice easy to use app thx for such a wonderful app i can track all my accounts at one place
total waste, it can not even update prices properly. trust me waste app for trading go for kite

This was my goto app for investing, but it seems like I'm the only one experiencing a glitch with a simple toggle button. Have been writing so many emails, but I'm constantly met with "we are checking with our concerned team". What really ticked me was they lied to me about the toggle button and mentioned it was removed during a recent update. Checked with my friends, and they all continue to have the option. Toggle button missing may seem trivial, but Ind's UI is what attracted me.
everything is fine but provides an equity curve in the app so that one can track his movement of capital over time during trading or investing

First they give you free mtf balance to use for buying shares for Rs.10000 then, they will remove that limit and charge~15% on that balance with no intimation, extremely dissatisfied with their service
not good 😡😡😡😡 frode 😡😡😡

I am trying to connect with customer care from friday 18 april,2026 from app but there is no option to connect live agent and chat gpt has no option to see any attachment, there is an error show in my us stock portfolio, all stock is in green but PL shows loss -2.82 usd, this is any hidden charge ? please tell me, I want to send screenshot but where ?? I don't know
good to be a part of this business.
Not able to withdraw money

it was a great app to start, networth includes all kinds of instruments. trading was nice, mtf was good. but suddenly the app started to hang/crash too often. scroll gets stuck. now there seems to be a ui refresh, and the stock doesn't show day high/low, my shares of that stock, and the best part missing is the x-y axis showing max min value. is there a way to bring this back? whats worse the price alerts are not firing up, missed multiple stocks going beyond price I wanted, seriously!!
this app a fraud app disgusting my money blocked

INDmoney offers useful features, but constant UI/UX changes make it frustrating to use. Frequent updates shift menus and navigation, forcing users to relearn the app again and again. Instead of improving usability, many changes create confusion and slow down simple tasks. A finance app should feel stable and predictable. Please focus on consistency and meaningful improvements rather than frequent redesigns.
Why you have removed option of foreclosure???Earlier it was available , now this application becomes same as other applications...
Please Make A Separate Fno Stock Watchlist
I thought you would give me cashback like 200 rs for transaction above 1000 rs but you didn't give me any of the rewards, so it is better to uninstall you.

The USD conversion via ICICI Bank is misleading. The exchange rate shown in the INDMoney app is not the rate actually applied—there’s a difference of about ₹0.30 per dollar, with the bank charging a higher rate. When I contacted ICICI Bank, they stated that since this is a third-party transaction, they cannot address the discrepancy. On the other hand, INDMoney’s support team was unable to provide a clear explanation for the difference in exchange rates.

Excellent functionality and integration. However, the following key functionality is missing in the portfolio section: It does not show YTD gain and CAGR of stocks purchased from other brokers. INDMoney has information about amount and current price from the depository so letting users manually add purchase date and buy price would enable this feature.
hate this app only give 4 bank (affiliate) to add money.due to this I dealy buying and loos the opportunity to by tesla.
Why the app is promoting Insta cash who don't want to kindly disable it and hide it you are highlighting it rather than stock broker apps looks like loan platform.

Unreasonably high MTF charges compared to competitors. INDmoney charges 0.1% uncapped brokerage on MTF trades. On a ₹7.7L trade, I was charged around ₹775 for a single order. plus 1k of additional charges (approx)Meanwhile, platforms like Zerodha cap brokerage at around ₹20 per order while offering similar or better margin benefits. If any one are planning to use MTF, think twice. This pricing model can quietly eat into your capital. these guys are looting like anything
netflix is down 9.6% today. your app shows 0.02% up!
excellent and great app, very good and easy to learn and use

I have sent INDmoney a feature request to improve a certain US stocks UX.. they implemented that in just 1 week! I think I can trust this app. I am a Mobile developer myself, I keep USB debugging ON because I need it for my work, but INDmoney being a payment app doesnt unnecessarily force logout me for disabling USBdebugging, they simply stop me when making UPI payments.. this is such a clever and impressive attention to detail! Seems like this app is built by devs who care about their users UX!
hi i am using this app since 2023, every updates are having good features, but when the last updated not good. when I open one stock, full white screen, i shock because it's looking like a toys tool
I sealed that stock four days ago. That balance hasn't been added to my account yet. My account balance is showing very low. My money has disappeared from Violet.
opportunity to acquire beyond imagination
I tried many time to change our phone number but still not done by indimoney.Very unuseful.
It is user friendly App
line chart was not good this updated version to compare previous one
My experience with this app so very bad because not direct call customer care number support ❌ add customer care service earlier as soon as possible 🙏
recently update added tradingview with Flash mode. now this app is awesome. please add comodity trading with this app..
very good app for investment
very bed service in this aap sabka brokerage charges alg alg charge kr rahe hai or tax bhi apne hisab se set kr rahe hai last 2 years se use kr rahi hu not satisfied with service
All good. New version is showing white background when clicked on purchased stock recently I feel old look and feel is good
it's a good exercise to improve your knowledge on finance

using the app last 6 months , the app performance is overall average, like other normal apps because ind money app looks not really serious for their users 🤬, because the app has no any advanced tool like zerodha and dhan have. app havs totally basic tools like other normal apps , 🙏🙏They should to understand that the main reason why their app will grow, is lesser brokrage for F&O than other platforms 👇👇. as a serious trader they should to add in f&o section "stocks future & oi buildup"
globaly very nice app interface is very smooth

the referral program is terrible. there was no option to enter the referral code during signup and when I contacted the customer care, they were like "you are supposed to use the link not code". what is the purpose of code then?!!!!!
overall having good trading experience, app working good, please add commodity options for trading.
trailing stop loss fashion integration uplabdh ho jaaye to achcha rahega
very good ui and i love this.
I want you to add notification categories where I get to decide whether or not I want your ad's when you charge me for services that I use for US based investments

worst experience with the app. I have transferred money and my money is on hold for the last 5 days. Mailed relevant documents and got an unprofessional reply stating password is wrong and which is absolutely disheartening with an app who is handling money of people. Further tried to connect to customer care, no option to connect them, only option is that the representative will connect and the waiting time keeps on increasing starting from 5 minutes then 15 minutes. I request to return my money
paiso ki loot. unnecessary new new bank account kholne lagate hai aur paise koi return nahi full waste 5 se sidha zero dena pad raha hai
cutting one star, because not giving option of SWP even fund houses are given, giving suggestion before 1 year, still not applicable, make it quick as soon as possible
experience is too good 😊

App experience in terms of Ac aggregating is good but few demats linked to nsdk stil face issue in reflecting. All banks if addded will make it better also auto linking insuramce and specially ULIP or Term insurance if added ti Networht with manual liabilities addition optional will make the app more effective. Looking forward to these improvements.

worst app, don't take any loan from this app with high interest people going and lock with the help of these kinds of apps. I do not recommend this app for taking loans because these people are not responsible for that. When you have a problem the IND money app will not help you in support but if the Loan provider has any problem the IND helps them to kill us.
I am not able to pay any payment. Their payment gateway worst
Please add an option on the trading chart to place trigger order using the plus button from the chart itself
I cannot find ETF , NO OPTION FOR ETF PURCHASE

The app is not functioning as expected. For US stocks even after plaving order and adding otp it says somwthing went wrong even though the transaction went thru. Recently I added $1 stock and it keeps on loading but I got an email order placed. Even after raising concern no action taken. Pathetic
please add income verification for fno by bank settlement by bank OTP not manually
Excellent & Superb,, Very Fast Easy Simple than Others..
new interference of order is not good please change it is very complex to once order place if I have to cancel we have to in another tab of orders it is easy to do while trading 🫡🤮
very fast and very helpful!
when i am clicking on the activate us account, it is not progressing further.
very good 👍 happy journey

the Nominee Center is a mess! please use full names (instead of first name and last name) for nominees as most government IDs use full names. INDpay UPI ID exposes our phone numbers, and there is no option to change it!
o*ha mass da without even trying it
little bit of delay to process
UI and UX both are so confusing, it's like to much information clustering into single panel, so irritating.
They fail to track credit card bills. overdue amount notified by bank. no responsibility borne by INDMONEY. These people are there to screw you over. Move to CRED or do it yourself !

I had deposited only ₹100 purely to understand the trading charges on your app. As part of this, I purchased 2 shares at ₹40 each and sold them after 2 days at ₹42 each. This was a very small and straightforward transaction intended only for testing purposes. However, I was shocked to see that ₹2 was deducted as INDmoney charges and an additional ₹22.19 was charged under Government Charges and Taxes.This brings the total deduction to ₹24.19 on a transaction of just ₹80,approx 30%, totally unfair
issue got resolved thank you team ind money. 🙏
why there are only some bank account to connect?and when we get call for video call kyc they say they have technical issue but on screen it shows good networks.
The spend analysis option is not available in the latest update. I linked all my bank accounts and credit cards so that i can track my spends easily. Now it is gone
I am very satisfied with the app but I have one observation - Why is my physical silver investment getting categorised as alternate investment?

lot of issues in modifying orders.. the app is good but this bugs are taking lots of time.i raise ticket they just close saying cancel and place order again.. After discussion with customer care they have fixed this issue. thanks
just a pathetic team of developers, cant resolve the MF portfolio refresh issue and closing the incidents again and again without any resolution. can't expect anything better anyhow
liked the app very much, but it would have been better if it had STP option too ?. I had to use another app for it.
very good App , charging lowest interest rate on mtf position, and one of least brokerage charges...
The worst app does unwanted changes in charts in updates. stay away as changing chart layout is the last thing a trades wants in update
today update happened buying option is not visible
The old interface is too good for us. The new update interface is very complicated.
waste dont download this app
good very nice app. it's very easy to use
don't use this app After few days this app stop my refer and earn and I lost my friend refer money
in your terms and conditions you telling that you would share my data with other .it's was feeling me so unsafe to sharing my data with you
Superb app, using it since few days and the service is good, didn't face any kind of problems with the deposit or withdrawal. Overall good service.
love you 😘 ind money🤑💸💵💴💶💰💳

This application engages in misleading practices by transferring investors’ external mutual fund holdings-originally managed through other distributors (Kuvera / Groww) - into its own demat account without obtaining proper consent. Furthermore, it is now refusing to facilitate the transfer of these holdings back to the Kuvera platform SOA mode from its own demat account. Pathetic and non cooperative attitude of the organisation.
greatest ,learners can learn and invest customer service is excellent
Perfect App. I'm a user, and so far, everything is clean!
a centralised app for managing your finances
Good app overall. Easy to use and helpful for beginners, but sometimes it takes time to process transactions.

don't ever use this broker for us stocks. they takes 20+ days to deposit your fund and take 30+ to withdrawal of your money. and they reply is generic from all customers support line is there problem going on with broker or going maintainance for 2 weeks wow. 😡😡

I applied for a Federal Bank account through INDmoney more than 20 days ago, but the account is still not open. I have completed all the steps, yet there is no update from the team. The customer support is also not providing a clear timeline. Very poor experience so far. Please resolve this as soon as possible! INDmoney app var Federal Bank account open करायला टाकून २० दिवस झाले, पण अजून काहीच प्रोसेस झाली नाहीये. खूप स्लो सर्व्हिस आहे. Customer support कडून पण काही नीट उत्तर मिळत नाहीये.

app is good but there is some issue which can not be ignored. 1. I added a bank account can not be delete. 2. IND money open a demate account without our permission if you try to invest in mutual fund (we don't need a demate account).
i will satisfy for this app...
too complicated too find anything, interface needs to be simplified like groww

The app is really good and very easy to use I am 18 and I recently started doing SIP with my savings so this app has helped me a lot in taking my first steps into investing everything feels simple and beginner friendly which is very important for someone like me who is just starting out I also really like how smooth the interface is and how easily I can understand everything the UPI works perfectly and the cashback feature makes it even better also the wallet system is very convenient and useful
Excellent App. Easy to Use. Easy to Decide.

balance showing in wallet but can't withdraw if I contact customer service they say no balance worst I deposited less fund to check but now that to not use for trading r withdraw money use less tension giving app
Do you have a support mechanism. Same old issue. No support and response on the query raised. Real time issue resolution is a problem at your end.
Mera Frist time in the traid no experience but dekhte h
Nice app overall, but please stop that irritating personal loan pop-up.. I have clicked it a couple of times now by mistake, it is such a stupid dark pattern for cheap marketing... very frustrating 😡

In mutual funds step up sip, it should give me option of % increase of sip instead of giving option of increase by a fixed amount only. Also this increase start date should be asked. Currently if I setup a new sip, it would only give option of monthly, quarterly or yearly without asking the first date when I want the increase to happen. I was also unable to find Nippon India Taiwan equity fund in mutual fund list.
Decent app ,they build user friendly, best choice for beginners

Does the job, but one major concern is NPS is tracked only via gmail which is a pathetic business decision (maybe their intention is to track mails and personal info ;-)) grow up guys have option to track via statement upload or some other means.
The customer care services are excellent, and they speak with great courtesy.

earlier app was better but in recent updates they have implemented generating QR code for mutual fund tracking, which is totally pathetic, it Generates QR & gives option to copy QR but after copying it doesn't allow to paste anywhere or doesn't allow to SUBMIT, then why does you have provided that option. Once you have copied QR it goes disappear & doesn't allow to download means you have to re initiate request again by doing authentication for tracking mutual funds. It takes too much time.
very nice app for intetnational stocks.
everything is okk... but i can't transact through my federal bank account for us stocks... pls fix the issue asap
use the app and Start by learning it for at least 3-6 months. Don't borrow money for tade and don't use pay later options.
I just downloaded but that is good like other.
worst customer service don't go for this app. l didn't receive my sell proceeds to my sb account even after 1 month .Zerodha is very good when it comes to customer service
very bad experience, they do not have any customer support at all ! always delay while withdrawal of money

I suffered a loss due to their technical error. when i deposited money A fake balance was shown in my account, and based on that I made a transaction. support says it was a technical issue and now you’ve stopped responding. Who will bear this loss? I need a clear answer.
worst aap ever 10 reminder calls everyday 1 week before due date they want you to pay before due date so they irritate you so much that you pay before.

From monday in my trading account doest show technical chart..it so bothering me..when i complain to support system they also doesnt rectify the technical issue even m attach the screenshot..so irritating..i cant do trade for that issue

Im an NRI and I starter investing 6 months ago and now all of a sudden I received notification from the app that some discrepancy has been found on my trade. I asked support agent to know what is the actual cause but they are just saying due to internal due diligence my account has been temporarily blocked. They are not telling what is the actual reason for it and how to resolve it and saying to wait for some time they dont have an update right now. I loved this app and now it screwed me.
can we trade intraday in us stocks with margin
waw super app no processing fee only wothin a second loan

Excellent app for investment in stock market as well mutual funds. Fast trading experience in option trading, stock trading. Very easy to use, easy to understand, easy to open demat account. kindly provide live payoff and probability of profit in option strategy position.

Horrible experience with INDmoney US stocks. - ₹8L debited March 26th is stuck with no refund yet. Plus lost opportunity on investments. - Funds that I managed to transfer have been processed only partially. The TAT jumped from March 30th to April 6th. - Misleading notifications claim money will arrive today but the app says otherwise. Unreliable systems with no predictability. Avoid if you value transparency and timely access to your capital.
seamless & easy to use app
Unnecessary withdrawal refund date extended day day day
this app is very bad Our money will be cut like that app not good. very very bad 😔😞😔

Always 5 ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ 📌Fast trading and order execution. 📌Flash scalping feature's User interface is uniquely designed. No other apps provide it. 📌In a single click, I can change any call & put. 📌FnO Brokerage -10₹ per order(but you need to connect with customer support to get this discount. if the offer is available, they will activate it). I have saved more than 2500₹ in March 2026. Other trading apps are charging 20₹ per order which were eating my profits. 📌So, YES to INDMoney.

worst app couldn't link my bank account Waited a month nothing happened. they'll tell you it will take 3 days but wouldn't happen. They steal data as well pathetic service. i recommend groww instead. switching the app now.
App makes balance rightly,measures all corner rightlly,but problems happen when open is not eassy to measure

Great experience with . The app is simple, smooth, and very easy to use. It helps in managing investments efficiently, and transactions are quick and reliable. One of the best features is getting cashback on UPI transactions, which adds extra value for daily use. Overall, a very useful and trustworthy app. Highly recommended!
beautiful app optimisation very good 👍 recommended for serious investers
Though they have tried but failed in many ways too. Mutual funds holdings portfolio sync is not as per MF central holdings. There is no option to track daily RD and daily gold/silver SIP.

"INDmoney is an exceptional all-in-one financial super-app. It simplifies tracking my entire net worth, from Indian stocks and mutual funds to EPF and bank balances, all in one sleek dashboard. The standout feature is the seamless US stock investing, allowing fractional shares with zero brokerage. The interface is intuitive, and the real-time insights into my spending and investment goals are incredibly helpful.

Don’t use this application. It’s very poor. in futures and options, nothing is as user-friendly as Zerodha. They have added too many features and now the app doesn’t work properly. It’s very slow and takes a long time to process. In today’s world, who would like something that works like a tortoise?
Great App for Overall Tracking. Facing one issue - How to edit the entries in the cash investment section which I have made manually, I want to remove those now. please advise
good trading app for intra day trading
Takes too much time for transaction from bank to account. No quick resolution and very delayed reaponses. Not a reliable partner, have to bear heavy loses.
I have used and closed many small loans from instacash, i liked it alot, but suddenly they removed the option to foreclosed the loan at anytime. This is the worst thing introduced lately!
Amazing app. Tracks my investments and loans perfectly!

Been using INDmoney since 2024 and the evolution is wild. As a 23yo CS grad, I really appreciate how much smoother the UI and tracking have gotten lately. One big suggestion for the devs you guys should seriously look into SnapTrade. It’s a solid brokerage integration platform that would take tracking to the next level. I know you already have your own in-house setup for tracking external brokers, but integrating SnapTrade would help way more people sync their portfolios Smooth and glitch-free.

the app is good, however m giving 2 star for below 1) you don't have option to download holding statement for MFs and nor backend team can support you on this 2) they don't have feature for daily SIP. while they used to have but now only providing this feature upto 100 rs only what a non sense

great app, I used over 3 years, very smooth transaction, good looking display, I am very happy for this app. I Will suggest to company wallet is missing, credit card to Wallet will a good decision for company. I hope so...
Dull Experience as compared to groww app I only download this app for Us Stocks, you should improve smoothness and functions of app

I am very disappointed with the service of INDmoney. Today my shares were sold without any prior information or notification. I did not receive any message, email, or alert before this transaction happened. As a user, I expect transparency and proper communication regarding my investments. Selling shares without informing the account holder creates confusion and loss of trust. I request the INDmoney team to explain why this happened and make sure such actions are not taken without informing th

Working good till now. Rating changed. Am trying to close the SBM account, they neither respond to email nor getting them over calls is easy. Not sure what prompted you to select such a bank who has got 2.2 rating here and who are totally unreachable. There are so many good banks but you chose to go with them and customers having harassment.

Worst experience in terms of customer service who are unable to fix any error related to account. Wasted my days when I wanted to invest on desired stocks.
